value:
v1.13.0 CODE COMPLETE 2026-04-23 — awaiting release tag.

All v1.13.0 milestone issues closed. Nine commits landed on origin/main:

SHIPPED (2026-04-23):
- #92 MCP tool description audit (530d284) — 19 descriptions rewritten; core lever was codex_get no longer advertising "list all entries" to cut the 48% empty-key pattern from the real-usage dataset.
- #93 audit log data quality gaps (0e8f813, 745c5a3) — 'remove' op distinct from 'write'; MCP-sessions labels on bootstrapRate/writeBackRate; CLI codex_run now passes rawKey for aliasResolved capture.
- #86 softprops/action-gh-release v2 → v3 (2b8d1cf) — last Node-20 action in release.yml.
- #89 shape-invalid import bypass (171b0e7) — import section extraction split into raw-pick → explicit shape validation → typed extraction. +3 tests.
- #90 hardcoded 'ccli' hint (a3aeb85) — replaced with getBinaryName() at all three locations found in the area.
- #91 cross-session handoff protocol (dcd2712) — context.next_session banner in codex_context (CLI + MCP) with age labeling and 7-day staleness marker. +10 handoff unit tests.
- #94 codex_copy aliasResolved semantic (742eb41) — narrow follow-up from #93 audit; tracks source alias instead of dest in both MCP and CLI wrappers.
- #88 askPassword non-interactive (19b8e0a) — CCLI_PASSWORD env var + --password-file flag on set/get/run/edit. +9 password tests.
- #39 interpolation-syntax audit (127f4bd) — backslash-escaped the 2 landmines (files.interpolate, context.execInterpolation). 77/77 entries now interpolate cleanly.
- #82 ccli lint --seed-quality (952aeae) — Layer 2A. Three heuristics: short+no-signal, low-amp phrase match, interp-landmine. +17 tests.
- #83 ccli topology (8120979) — Layer 2B. Co-occurrence analysis on focused codex_get reads; graphviz DOT output. +13 tests.

Test count: 1269 → 1325 (+56). Feedback memory added: "all codex data must be checked in" (retired session.last experiment). seedDensity gained a carve-out for context.next_session.

MILESTONE TRIM (2026-04-23): #84/#45/#50/#47/#6 moved out of v1.13.0 and into the unmilestoned backlog — each is bigger than anything shipped in this cycle and would have stretched v1.13.0 past its "agent-first, dataset-driven" narrative.

NEXT: Release v1.13.0. Bump package.json version, then run commands.release (git push + tag + push tag). CHANGELOG.md + ROADMAP.md may need trimming. Dogfooding Part Two (docs/dogfooding-real-usage.md, committed 2026-04-22) is publishable alongside the tag — worth an addendum paragraph about the eleven-issue v1.13.0 closure driven by the usage dataset.

BACKLOG (was in v1.13.0 at some point, now unmilestoned):
- #84 unified entry health (lifecycle/coldness/staleness) — larger multi-session feature
- #45 entry attribution (who/what last modified)
- #50 npx codexcli zero-install
- #47 ccli diff — compare local vs committed
- #6 Fish/PowerShell shell completion
